qcStages.label: Pracharaka Certification
qcStages.description: Verify the referring Pracharaka has completed training and is certified

items.label: Pracharaka is a registered program participant

qcStages.label: Astro Eligibility Validation
qcStages.description: Confirm astrochart assessment was completed and eligibility status is valid

items.label: Astrochart prepared by designated astrology team
PK suitability period identified and recorded

qcStages.label: Medical Screening Approval
qcStages.description: Confirm screening was conducted and patient approval is documented

qcStages.label: Treatment Protocol Review
qcStages.description: Verify the treatment plan is complete, distributed, and medicines dispatched

items.label: All 12 protocol sections filled by Treating Vaidya
Therapy schedule distributed to ACO, therapy team, patient portal
Medicine lists completed for all 4 categories
Medicine list forwarded to pharmacy partner

qcStages.label: ACO Operational Checklist
qcStages.description: Confirm all ACO-managed admission and coordination steps are complete

items.label: Patient officially entered into PK program

qcStages.label: Patient Feedback
qcStages.description: Collect and record structured patient feedback on clinical and service quality

items.label: Post-program feedback form submitted by patient
